purpose: A compact tag control used to show a numeric KPI alongside a short label. Combines a label with a value, optionally with a semantic status color. Common in dashboards and object headers.
whenToUse: Show a KPI with label + numeric value (e.g. 'Overdue: 12')
Alongside ObjectStatus when both a metric and a categorical state are needed
In an Object Header header content region
For at-a-glance metrics that don't require a full chart
whenNotToUse: For purely categorical state without a value — use ObjectStatus
For a categorical label without a value or state — use InfoLabel
For long text — use Text or Title
As a status indicator in table cells — use ObjectStatus for row status
doRules: Pair semantic status color with icon or text for accessibility
Use design=StatusIconHidden when the status is expressed by value alone
Right-align in dashboard KPI rows for visual scanning
dontRules: Do not use color alone to convey status (WCAG 1.4.1)
Do not put full sentences in the label
Do not stack GenericTags vertically — use a proper KPI grid
Do not use for booleans — use Switch or CheckBox

layoutGuidance.placement: Horizontal row in dashboards, object header content region, card content
layoutGuidance.sizing: Hug content. Min height 32px compact, 40px cozy
layoutGuidance.alignment: Label + value inline, or label above value in stacked mode

contentGuidance.contentRules: Label is a noun phrase, value is a number or short string

requirements: Semantic status colors always paired with icon or descriptive text
Value + label together form an accessible name
